name: Atlantis
description:
Your life begins in the City of the Ancients, the cradle of both magic and technology.

After reaching your majority, your tattoo begins to glow, signaling that you are ready to choose your place in society. Here, everything is possible (even slacking off all day). What the humans (now long extinct) once designated as "magic", we simply call "Science." You are free to align yourself with whichever Archmage you choose or joining a guild.

But heed this warning: never cross the boundaries of our shield. Beyond this liquid mana ocean lies a land where shadows dwell, thriving upon the ruins of the human civilization that stood there before us. It is a world of bone and rot that hungers for our light..."
creator: Mackarov
